security_considerations: Message bus delivery semantics require replay handling, partition/ordering controls, and duplicate-safe processing.
HTTP/WS endpoints must enforce authentication, anti-replay controls, and idempotent message ingestion semantics.
MCP bridge implementations must preserve message integrity and enforce access controls on tools/call endpoints.
compatibility_notes: Stable canonical binding identifier for MCP transport semantics.

security_considerations: Consumers must tolerate duplicates and reordering safely.
deprecation_notes: Deprecated alias; use BIND-BUS-0.1 for canonical negotiation and compatibility evidence.

security_considerations: Endpoints must enforce idempotency and auth profile externally.
deprecation_notes: Deprecated alias; use BIND-HTTP-0.1 for canonical negotiation and compatibility evidence.

security_considerations: Remote bridges may observe content unless payload is protected. Deprecated alias for BIND-MCP-0.1; retain only for backward compatibility.
deprecation_notes: Deprecated alias; use BIND-MCP-0.1 for new negotiation and compatibility evidence.
